calculate(boolean, double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.filter.Debouncer
Applies the debouncer to the input stream deterministically.
calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.controller.BangBangController
Calculates the control output based on the current measurement and the preconfigured setpoint.
calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.controller.ElevatorFeedforward
Calculates the feedforward from the gains and velocity setpoint (acceleration is assumed to be zero).
calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.controller.PIDController
Calculates the control output given a measured value based on the previously set setpoint.
calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.controller.ProfiledPIDController
Calculates the next output of the controller using deterministic simulation time.

Calculates the feedforward given a specific velocity.
calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.controller.TrapezoidProfile

calculate(double) - Method in class org.areslib.math.filter.LinearFilter
Calculates the next value of the filter.

Enum representing the status of the absolute localizer algorithm You can poll this to determine when IMU calibration has finished.

The absolute localizer automagically selects the appropriate axis on the IMU to use for yaw, regardless of physical mounting orientation.

ParallelCommandGroup - Class in org.areslib.command
A CommandGroup that runs a set of commands in parallel, ending when the last command ends.

Creates a new ParallelCommandGroup.
ParallelDeadlineGroup - Class in org.areslib.command
A CommandGroup that runs a set of commands in parallel, ending only when a specific command (the "deadline") ends, interrupting all other commands that are still running at that point.

setLedColor(double, double, double, int) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.wrappers.AresGamepad
Sets the LED color of the controller (PS4/PS5 compatibility).
setLocalizerCountsPerMmX(float) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Set the scalar for converting encoder counts on the X port to millimeters of travel You SHOULD NOT calculate this - this is a real world not a theoretical one - you should measure this by pushing your robot N millimeters and dividing the counts by N.
setLocalizerCountsPerMmY(float) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Set the scalar for converting encoder counts on the Y port to millimeters of travel You SHOULD NOT calculate this - this is a real world not a theoretical one - you should measure this by pushing your robot N millimeters and dividing the counts by N.
setLocalizerHeading(float) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Teleport the localizer heading to a new orientation.
setLocalizerImuHeadingScalar(float) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Set a scale factor to apply to the IMU heading to improve accuracy The recommended way to tune this is to use the heading scalar tuning OpMode.
setLocalizerPortX(int) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Set the port index to be used by the absolute localizer routine for measuring X movement
setLocalizerPortY(int) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
Set the port index to be used by the absolute localizer routine for measuring Y movement

setLocalizerTcpOffsetMmX(float) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3
The real TCP (Tracking Center Point) of your robot is the point on the robot, where, if the robot rotates about that point, neither the X nor Y tracking wheels will rotate.

setSingleEncoderDirection(int, OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDirection) - Method in class org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.OctoQuadFWv3

A standalone trapezoidal motion profile generator, decoupled from any PID controller.

A dummy TrapezoidProfile fallback implementation since ARESLib relies on native math profiles.

turnKp - Variable in class org.areslib.subsystems.drive.SwerveDriveSubsystem.Config
